backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the Guest Rental Management backend with access-controlled endpoints for user profiles, guest CRUD, notifications, monthly bill generation, and owner PIN management.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the darker color theme update was applied to frontend/src/index.css with high confidence, referencing the relevant components and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their roles in the Guest Rental Management app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes using neutral (zero chroma) values.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with a root Layout wrapper and three child routes: home (/), owner dashboard (/owner), and guest view (/guest).
frontend/src/components/GuestBillNotific: Read-only guest-facing component that displays monthly bill notifications split into pending and cleared sections, showing billing month/year, amount, and due date with status badges.
frontend/src/components/GuestCard.tsx: Card component displaying individual guest details (name, ID, phone, room, rent, due date, payment status) with edit (via GuestForm dialog) and delete (with confirmation dialog) actions.
frontend/src/components/GuestForm.tsx: A dialog form component for adding or editing a guest profile, with validation and mutation hooks for create/update operations.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component providing a sticky header with responsive navigation links, a main content area, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/MonthlyBillNotif: Displays monthly bill notifications split into pending and cleared sections, with a button to mark individual bills as cleared.
frontend/src/components/NotificationList: Renders active and cleared rent-due notifications for guests, allowing the owner to mark notifications as paid/cleared.
frontend/src/components/OwnerPinPrompt.t: A PIN entry card component that validates the owner's PIN via a mutation hook and calls onSuccess when the PIN is correct.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags. Includes an `InternetIdentityProvider` component that persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including CRUD operations for guests and fetching/generating notifications. Uses `useActor` to access the canister actor and invalidates relevant query caches on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Nunito and Playfair Display fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS layers, and defines a warm earthy CSS custom property palette for both light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with `QueryClientProvider` for React Query and `InternetIdentityProvider` for authentication wrapping the root `App` component.
frontend/src/pages/GuestView.tsx: A public-facing page where guests can look up their bill status and notifications by entering their Guest ID. Displays guest profile details, active/cleared notifications, and loading/not-found states.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page for the Casa Rental app featuring a hero section with navigation to the Owner Dashboard and Guest Bill Lookup, a feature highlights grid, and a getting-started card.
frontend/src/pages/OwnerDashboard.tsx: PIN-protected owner dashboard that displays guest management and notification tabs, auto-generates monthly bills on authentication, and provides controls to add guests, refresh data, and lock the dashboard.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and cleaning URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, using sessionStorage for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the RentEase frontend, defining custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, shadows, and animation keyframes with dark mode support.
project_state.json: Tracks the RentEase project state at version 3, recording existing features and pending feature requests including a darker color theme and changing the owner PIN to '18215'.
